suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify mors-global-worker skill step 8 (manual check requirement): when a fix feature has no user-facing surface to manually test (e.g., internal test-only or security-hardening changes), the handoff should include an explicit non-applicability rationale rather than silently omitting the interactiveChecks section.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both fix features (developer-launch-fix-deploy-shell-injection-safety and developer-launch-fix-restart-integrity-persistence-boundary) reported followedProcedure=true but omitted manual checks without rationale. Both reviewers flagged this independently as a skill-procedure clarity gap.

rejectedObservations.observation: Skill-procedure manual-check reporting gap (from restart-integrity reviewer)
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate — same observation from deploy-injection reviewer, consolidated into single suggestedGuidanceUpdates entry above
